title: Toothiep's Better Minecraft - TBMC
description:
Why play vanilla, when you can play this?
TBMC is a Vanilla+ modpack that introduces tons of new things into the game, making it feel like a sequel.
body:
Why play vanilla, when you can play this?

**Toothiep's Better Minecraft** is a Vanilla+ modpack that introduces tons of new things into the game, making it feel like a sequel.

✔️ Updated all dimensions

✔️ Quests

✔️ Overhauled world generation (Biomes o plenty)

✔️ New and Improved structures (Yung's better mods, Explorify, Structory)

✔️ New Mechanics (Better Combat and Farmers Delight)

✔️ Brand new mobs (Alex's Mobs, Friends and Foes, Puppy Paws)

✔️ Endgame bosses (Cataclysm, Unusual End)

✔️ QoL Features like Waystones, Quark, Appleskin, Corpse, Trade Cycling, Easy Magic and Jade

✔️ Better inventory Management (Backpacked, Supplementaries)

✔️ Fully optimized with Shader support (Complementary Reimagined)

✔️ 180+ Mods

Hope you enjoy :D
